payload_policy: metadata and governance only; no P3 source payloads, labels, or full releases are read or committed

commit_safe_artifacts: review pack structure without restricted labels
known_blockers: FMA release location, active maintenance status, and license terms must be verified before payload ingestion.
FMA can support anatomy consistency checks, but identifier-network and translation-use outputs remain blocked until terms review passes.
Anatomical entity labels can support validation but not disease or phenotype mappings by themselves.
records.next_allowed_action: complete public ontology terms review before any source payload or label extraction

commit_safe_artifacts: review pack structure without restricted labels
known_blockers: LDDB source authority, maintenance status, license, and access path require confirmation.
No payload, derived evidence, identifier mapping, or translation comparison should be planned until the authoritative source is identified.
local_only_requirements: source-specific extraction outputs remain local-only until access and redistribution terms pass review
records.next_allowed_action: identify authoritative LDDB source, maintenance status, access path, and redistribution terms

scope: P3 investigation-only or uncertain-source ontology tracks
